analysis.object: T423: Navier-Stokes Partial Regularity CKN depth analysis

singular_set.description: Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg: singular set has Hausdorff dim ≤ 1

partial_reg.description: Partial regularity: smooth except on thin set
partial_reg.reason: smooth part = EML-3; singular part = EML-2

singular_measure_zero.description: Singular set ⊂ null set: EML-0 in measure

partial_beyond_full.description: Partial regularity is EML-3; full regularity is EML-inf
partial_beyond_full.reason: gap: EML-3 partial vs EML-inf full

partial_reg_depth.description: T423: partial regularity = EML-3 result; singular set is EML-0 in measure; full regularity remains EML-inf
